scripts.build: pnpm install -s && node_modules/.bin/bower install && pnpm exec coffee --join target/classes/webapp/compiled/scripts.js --compile src/main/resources/coffee/*.coffee
scripts.watch: pnpm install -s && node_modules/.bin/bower install && pnpm exec coffee --watch --join target/classes/webapp/compiled/scripts.js --compile src/main/resources/coffee/*.coffee
